languages.original_text: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."

languages.text: "Возомнил, что Аребенниан предсказуем? Наивно. Впрочем, вы, мон-каи, знаете о подобных ему слишком мало, чтобы здраво оценивать этих... исполнителей".
"You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."
languages.original_text: "Возомнил, что Аребенниан предсказуем? Наивно. Впрочем, вы, мон-каи, знаете о подобных ему слишком мало, чтобы здраво оценивать этих... исполнителей".

traits.locale_text: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."
"You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."
"You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."

languages.text: «¿Crees que puedes predecir a un Arebennian? Qué ingenuo. Aunque es cierto que los mon-keigh no conocéis suficiente a su clase como para juzgar a estos... actores».
languages.original_text: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."

traits.locale_text: «¿Crees que puedes predecir a un Arebennian? Qué ingenuo. Aunque es cierto que los mon-keigh no conocéis suficiente a su clase como para juzgar a estos... actores».

languages.text: 「アレベニアンが予測できるとでも？ なんと愚かな。もっとも、貴様らモンケイは奴の同類についてあまりに無知ゆえ、この……演者たちについて、まともな判断など下せまいがな」
languages.original_text: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."

traits.locale_text: 「アレベニアンが予測できるとでも？ なんと愚かな。もっとも、貴様らモンケイは奴の同類についてあまりに無知ゆえ、この……演者たちについて、まともな判断など下せまいがな」

languages.text: “你以为独角是可预测的？真是天真。不过也是，你们猴子对其了解实在太少，根本无从判断这些……表演者。”
languages.original_text: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."

traits.locale_text: “你以为独角是可预测的？真是天真。不过也是，你们猴子对其了解实在太少，根本无从判断这些……表演者。”

languages.text: "Ihr haltet den Arebennian für berechenbar? Wie naiv. Andererseits wisst Ihr Chem-Pan-Sey zu wenig von dieser Art, um ein vernünftiges Urteil über sie abzugeben."
languages.original_text: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr haltet den Arebennian für berechenbar? Wie naiv. Andererseits wisst Ihr Chem-Pan-Sey zu wenig von dieser Art, um ein vernünftiges Urteil über sie abzugeben."

languages.text: « Vous pensez que l'on peut comprendre les Arebennians ? Quelle naïveté ! Là encore, les mon-keigh en savent trop peu sur son espèce pour pouvoir émettre un jugement pertinent sur ces... saltimbanques. »
languages.original_text: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."

traits.locale_text: « Vous pensez que l'on peut comprendre les Arebennians ? Quelle naïveté ! Là encore, les mon-keigh en savent trop peu sur son espèce pour pouvoir émettre un jugement pertinent sur ces... saltimbanques. »

languages.text: "Arebennian'ın tahmin edilebileceğini mi sanıyorsun? Ne kadar naifsin. Gerçi siz mon-keighler bu... Performansçıları doğru bir şekilde yargılayabilmek için türü hakkında çok az şey biliyorsunuz."
languages.original_text: "You think the Arebennian can be predicted? How naive. Then again, you mon-keigh know too little of his kind to make a sound judgement of these... performers."

traits.locale_text: "Arebennian'ın tahmin edilebileceğini mi sanıyorsun? Ne kadar naifsin. Gerçi siz mon-keighler bu... Performansçıları doğru bir şekilde yargılayabilmek için türü hakkında çok az şey biliyorsunuz."
